prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2231名、1713名、1684名、1777名、2229名。2021至2023年位次整体前移（数字减小），2024年略有后移，2025 年大幅后移至2229名，较2024年增加约452名，近两年呈明显后移趋势，2025年基准位次约2229名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年75人、2022年70人、202 3–2025年均为72人；2026年计划72人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，计划因素对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科 中国大学排名近年稳定在第23–27名区间（2026年第27名），属于全国顶尖高校梯队，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，原校长张尧学因 涉嫌严重违纪违法被查，可能对学校整体形象产生一定影响；抖音热度排名第85位，评价为"一般"，未出现高热关注；2024年曾出现部分省份录取断档信号，2025年重庆地下空间 工程专业分数线异常，但整体影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，冶金工程、护理学获评A+，材料科学与工程获评A，临床医学、交通运输工程、土木工程、计算机 科学与技术等11个学科获评A-，A-及以上学科共13个，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化类、临床医学类等热门专业社会 热度持续较高；海南省考生总数从2021年约5.3万人持续增长至2025年约6.7万人，2026年预计约7.8万人（较2025年增长约15.7%），考生规模大幅增加将加剧竞争；中南大学位于湖南长沙，属华中地区，海南省考生跨省报考中南大学属常规选择；该校 在海南招生计划约72人，占比较小，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生规模显著增长（+15.7%） 带来的竞争加剧，以及声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲的权衡，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年2229名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低录取位次约2264名，波动区间1941–2587名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2264名，区间1941–2587名。位次在区间下限（1941名）附近可重点冲刺一档的临床医学八年制、口腔医学5+3、计算机类等王牌专业；位次在预测值（2264名）附近 建议以二档的自动化类、电子信息类、法学、数学类为主，搭配一档专业冲刺；位次在区间上限（2587名）附近建议以三档专业为主保底，同时争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Hainan Province were approximately 2231, 1713, 1684, 1777, and 2229 respectively. Rankings generally moved forward (decreasing numbers) from 2021 to 2023, slightly moved backward in 2024, and significantly moved backward to 2229 in 2025, an increase of about 452 places compared to 2024, showing a clear backward trend in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2229. The enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 75 in 2021, 70 in 2022, and 72 from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 plan is 72, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, making the plan factor neutral for competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 23rd to 27th range in recent years (27th in 2026), placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, which strongly attracts candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, as former president Zhang Yaoxue is under investigation for suspected serious violations of discipline and law, which may have some impact on the overall image of the school. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th, rated as 'average', without high attention. In 2024, there were signals of admission gaps in some provinces, and in 2025, the score line for the Underground Space Engineering major in Chongqing was abnormal, but the overall impact is limited. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing were rated A+, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, and 11 disciplines including Clinical Medicine, Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology were rated A-, totaling 13 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and sustained appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has grown from about 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025). The significant increase in candidate numbers will intensify competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the Central China region. Cross-province applications from Hainan candidates to Central South University are a conventional choice. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan is about 72, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the intensified competition due to the notable increase in candidate numbers in Hainan Province (+15.7%), and the trade-off between a somewhat negative reputation and strong disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 2229. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 2264, with a fluctuation range of 1941 to 2587.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2264, with a range of 1941 to 2587. Candidates with rankings near the lower bound (1941) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3, and Computer Science. Candidates with rankings near the predicted value (2264) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like Automation, Electronic Information, Law, and Mathematics, while also sprinting for Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (2587) are advised to primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also aiming for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
